channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Five humanitarian workers killed in convoy ambush in South Sudan
item.description: UN 'deeply saddened' by Monday attack on convoy in Jonglei State, calls for investigation.

item.title: Norway edge Ivory Coast 2–1 to enter World Cup Round of 16
item.description: Haaland scores his fifth goal of the World Cup to set up a knockout match against Brazil in New York on Sunday.

item.title: Evolution under fire: Iran’s ‘axis of resistance’ in a post-war era
item.description: Has Iran's regional deterrence been permanently degraded, or is its proxy network mutating into a resilient force?

item.title: Cuba’s foreign minister observes ‘no progress’ in US negotiations
item.description: A top Cuban official has accused the US of issuing 'constant threats' and attempting to scuttle a UN debate.

item.title: German heatwave melts tram tracks, triggers travel disruptions
item.description: Extreme heat melted a tramway track in Leipzig and disrupted public transport after temperatures climbed to 41C (106F).

item.title: How much of your life do you spend on social media?
item.description: On world social media day, Al Jazeera breaks down the numbers.

item.title: Healthcare situation in DR Congo improves amidst Ebola crisis
item.description: The Ebola virus continues to spread across the DR Congo but local healthcare workers say the situation has improved.

item.title: What happened on South Africa’s anti-migrant ‘deadline day’
item.description: Protests in South Africa after campaign groups set June 30 as a deadline for undocumented migrants to leave the country.

item.title: Russia’s fuel crisis deepens following Ukrainian drone strikes
item.description: Russia's fuel crisis deepens as Ukrainian drone strikes intensify

item.title: Lebanon’s fragile ceasefire: 3 months later
item.description: This video also looks at what happened during the three months of the fragile ceasefire.

item.title: Birthright citizenship ruling: US officials, lawmakers and advocates react
item.description: Trump calls top court's ruling affirming birthright citizenship 'too bad for country' as advocates cheer decision.

item.title: England vs DR Congo: World Cup Round of 32: Kane, match prediction, lineups
item.description: Title contenders England, led by Harry Kane, face Yoane Wissa's DR Congo, as the teams fight for a place in the last-16.

item.title: How is South Africa dealing with immigration?
item.description: Anti-migrant groups had given a deadline to undocumented foreigners to leave by June 30.

item.title: At least 14 children killed after roof of Pakistan tuition centre collapses
item.description: One teacher and eight other children also injured after incident in Lahore.

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down US campaign spending limits in landmark ruling
item.description: The High Court strikes down campaign spending limits, citing First Amendment protections in a 6-3 decision

item.title: US heatwave to test power grid amid soaring AI-driven energy demand
item.description: Grid operators warn the US heatwave could send electricity demand near record levels before Fourth of July weekend.

item.title: UN warns Ebola could cost Africa $3.6bn and jobs
item.description: The latest Ebola outbreak in DRC has infected 1,307 people and claimed 377 lives since May.

item.title: LeBron James not returning to Lakers, will choose new NBA team: Report
item.description: NBA's all-time leading scorer told Los Angeles Lakers he would not return for a ninth season with the storied franchise.

item.title: US Supreme Court upholds transgender sports ban
item.description: The court decided 9-0 that the state laws do not violate the Title IX civil rights statute.

item.title: LIVE: France vs Sweden – FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: All our updates, live build-up, team news coverage and full text commentary stream as Mbappe's France eye last-16.

item.title: Toddler pulled from debris six days after Venezuelan earthquakes
item.description: A Jordanian rescue team used thermal imaging to rescue a toddler who had been trapped under rubble for six days.

item.title: Palestine weekly: Israel accelerates land grabs in Gaza, West Bank
item.description: Permanent alterations begin at Hebron's Ibrahimi Mosque as plans advance for settlements in Gaza.

item.title: The path from Gaza to Trump’s return
item.description: How the Biden administration’s response to October 7 reshaped US politics and influenced the 2024 presidential election.

item.title: How severe is Russia’s energy shortage because of Ukrainian strikes?
item.description: Analysts say Russia's fuel crisis may affect its domestic economy, but the war in Ukraine will remain the priority.

item.title: Heavy rainfall kills dozens in Ghana, Ivory Coast
item.description: Greater Accra Regional Fire Command says crews rescued more than 400 people.
